audit_items.proof_trace: ResolveAddress functions accept RpcEndpoint* parameter but unconditionally dereference it at line 42 (*endpoint = it->endpoint()) without NULL validation. All ResolveAddress variants eventually reach this vulnerable dereference.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker calls RpcClientImpl::ResolveAddress with nullptr as second parameter, causing segmentation fault when code dereferences the NULL pointer at rpc_endpoint.cc:42.
